text: Image processing has become ubiquitous across various disciplines, and hence several methods are developed to deal with problems like removing noise, image restoration, contrast adjustment, feature extraction, image classification, etc. Many of these image processing techniques enhance understanding of images, feature extraction, etc., and decision making using image data. In all, image processing methods have been categorized mainly into two streams: traditional image processing and Deep Learning (DL) methods. Traditional methods always depend on manually created techniques and set of rules or algorithms where as Deep Learning based methods learn image features from data provided. While processing images using traditional image processing and Deep Learning based techniques like Self2Self NN, Denoising CNNs, DFT-Net, MPR-CNN are dealing in removing noise from image while on the other hand dealing with insufficient data set, selecting optimised number of parameters and various augmentations. On the enhancement part, models like R2R, LE-net, etc., can deal with the enhancement of quality of the given image. But as discussed earlier the authenticity and exactness of images are yet to be obtained. Furthermore, several segmentation methods were introduced for segmenting the images accurately such as, PSPNet and Mask-RCNN, but dealing with objects having overlapping structures and robustness of the model towards diverse noises still remain unsolved. Likewise, features in an image can also be extracted automatically using certain image processing and Deep Learning techniques which preserve the inner attributes of images like colors, etc. Hence features in images like CNN, HLF-DIP can be extracted, but preserving interpretability of the feature extraction models in Deep Learning and unavoidable complexities in traditional methods are required to be solved. Lastly, for the image classification models such as, Residual Networks, and CNN-LSTM can classify images into certain predefined classes efficiently. However, Deep Learning models required high computational powers for image processing, which is to be addressed to a large extent by applying efficient coding methods. Similarly, understanding of the classified classes for DL based methods is to be determined so that their inner attributes may also be extracted and utilized.
explanation: The passage has a generic, survey-like tone with awkward phrasing and some inconsistent terminology, which is common in AI-generated text, though a human-written draft is also possible. The numerous model names and broad claims without depth lean toward automation rather than a polished expert-authored piece.
